title: B.Sc Jobs 2026 – Nursing Superintendent
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Nursing Superintendent. Candidates with Diploma, B.Sc, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Dharwad official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Nursing Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Nursing Superintendent. Candidates with Diploma, B.Sc, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Dharwad official website.

application_fee.details: The maximum age limit for the Nursing Superintendent post is not more than 40 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the Nursing Superintendent post is not more than 40 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 Year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with minimum 60% marks + 06 years' experience OR Four-Year B.Sc. (Nursing) with minimum 60% marks + 03 years' experience. Master's Degree (Nursing) can count towards experience (max 02 years).
qualification.details: Nursing Superintendent: 03 Year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with minimum 60% marks Four-Year B.Sc. (Nursing) with minimum 60% marks Experience: 06 years' experience after diploma in a recognized hospital OR 03 years' experience after degree in a registered hospital. For candidates with a full-time Master's Degree (Nursing), the duration of the Master's program shall be counted towards experience (maximum up to 02 years).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT Dharwad Nursing Superintendent position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Nursing Superintendent post at IIT Dharwad is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Nursing Superintendent role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 3-Year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with at least 60% marks and 6 years of experience, or a 4-Year B.Sc. (Nursing) with at least 60% marks and 3 years of experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Nursing Superintendent position is 40 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Nursing Superintendent post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Superintendent post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Nursing Superintendent post on a contract basis at IIT Dharwad.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the IIT Dharwad Nursing Superintendent recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹ 200/- (Rupees Two hundred only), including GST, for all categories.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply ONLY through the online process via the official IIT Dharwad website.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Nursing Superintendent position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Skill Test/Interview or any other mode decided by the Institute or Selection Committee.

faq.question: Is there any experience required for the Nursing Superintendent post?
faq.answer: Yes, 06 years of experience after a diploma or 03 years of experience after a degree is required. A Master's degree can count towards experience up to 02 years.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the IIT Dharwad website, which is provided in the Important Links section.
